title: eupomatiaceae
intro: The Eupomatiaceae is a family of flowering plants that consists of approximately 20 species. It is a distinct grouping of plants characterized by their unique characteristics and shared ancestry. Eupomatiaceae is a family within the magnoliids, a group of flowering plants known for their primitive flower structure. These plants are primarily found in the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and are often recognized by their distinctive fruit and leaf morphology.
